headline: American Electric's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: AEP beats Q1 earnings estimates as revenues rose 10% and new load deals in Ohio and Texas support contracted growth toward 63 GW by 2030.

raw.headline: American Electric's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: AEP beats Q1 earnings estimates as revenues rose 10% and new load deals in Ohio and Texas support contracted growth toward 63 GW by 2030.

headline: PEG Q1 Earnings Beat Expectations, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: PSEG's Q1 earnings beat estimates, revenues increase 19.4%, and operating income jumps to $1.08 billion, with electric and gas sales volumes rising year over year.

raw.headline: PEG Q1 Earnings Beat Expectations, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: PSEG's Q1 earnings beat estimates, revenues increase 19.4%, and operating income jumps to $1.08 billion, with electric and gas sales volumes rising year over year.

headline: Duke Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: DUK tops Q1 estimates with strong revenue and earnings growth, but rising costs and higher interest expenses weigh on its overall financial picture.

raw.headline: Duke Energy Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: DUK tops Q1 estimates with strong revenue and earnings growth, but rising costs and higher interest expenses weigh on its overall financial picture.
